title: LevelUP! Tome Expansion 1
description: Adds 14 new simple skill tomes for the LevelUP! datapack.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d388931f2ea7f9d1c59fdc3b4e66241a434a1ee5.png) # LevelUP! Tome Expansion #1 Adds 14 new skill tomes for the LevelUP! datapack. These tomes are all made to be simple stat buffs and tradeoffs for people who dislike the type of crazy abilities that come with the later tome packs or just want to supplement all that madness. Also adds some simple tomes that give base stats instead of percent buffs to help people scale their stats better! This is an addon for the LevelUP! datapack and will not function without it. ## New Tomes Added
Tome of Jumping Aspect of the Rabbit :
+100% Jump Height
Knowledge Point Cost : 5
Obtained via crafting
Tome of the Moon Moonstep : -50% Gravity
You no longer take fall damage.
Knowledge Point Cost : 15
Obtained via a 10% chance to drop from shulkers
Tome of Paitence Heavy Strikes :
+200% Damage
-50% Attack Speed
Knowledge Point Cost : 25
Obtained via a 33% chance to drop either Tome of Paitence or Tome of Many Strikes in dungeon loot chests
Tome of Many Strikes Swift Strikes :
+200% Attack Speed
-50% Damage
Knowledge Point Cost : 25
Obtained via a 33% chance to drop either Tome of Paitence or Tome of Many Strikes in dungeon loot chests
Tome of Stillness Master of Serenity :
-10 Damage
-75% Damage
You gain a permanenet regeneration effect.
Knowledge Point Cost : 25
Obtained via crafting
Tome of Good Health Hearty :
+6 Health
Knowledge Point Cost : 10
Obtained via a 0.5% chance to be dropped by zombies
Tome of Endurance Thick Skinned :
+2 Armor
Knowledge Point Cost : 4
Obtained via crafting
Tome of the Ocean Guardians Blessing :
+1 Swim Speed
You can breathe underwater forever.
Knowledge Point Cost : 15
Obtained via a 35% chance to drop from elder guardians
Tome of Fragility Glass Cannon :
+100% Damage
-25% Health
-100% Armor
Knowledge Point Cost : 15
Obtained via crafting
Tome of Immolation Fire Retardant :
When you are lit on fire it gets extinguished instantly.
Knowledge Point Cost : 10
Obtained via a 5% chance to drop from blazes
Tome of the Speedster Swiftfoot :
+0.3 Speed
Knowledge Point Cost : 5
Obtained via crafting
Tome of Stone Statue :
+4 Health
+15% Health
+15% Armor
+50% Armor Toughness
-100% Movement Speed
Knowledge Point Cost : 20
Obtained via crafting
Tome of Weight Heavy :
+35% Knockback Resistance
-35% Speed
Knowledge Point Cost : 10
Obtained via crafting
Tome of Reach Long Arms :
+1 Attack Range
+1 Mining Range
Knowledge Point Cost :
Obtained via crafting
